name: otterwise
description: Autonomous compound research platform — spawns agent teams to analyze datasets with Python notebooks and a graph of discoveries

skills.name: research
skills.description: Start a new Otterwise research session on a dataset

skills.name: continue
skills.description: Continue and expand an existing Otterwise research session

skills.name: status
skills.description: Show the current state of Otterwise research

skills.name: autopilot
skills.description: Run autonomous research rounds with automated loop control and decision engine

skills.name: autopilot-pause
skills.description: Pause a running auto pilot research session

skills.name: autopilot-abort
skills.description: Abort a running auto pilot research session
